footer.description: AI-powered learning platform with courses, tutoring, career tools, and certificates.

courses.title: Explore Courses
courses.subtitle: Discover courses designed to help you master new skills

verifiedCertificates.title: Your Certificate Journey
verifiedCertificates.subtitle: Complete a course, pass assessments, and earn a verified certificate that you can download, share on LinkedIn, and showcase in your portfolio.
verifiedCertificates.howItWorksDesc: Your path from enrollment to certification in 7 simple steps.
verifiedCertificates.ctaTitle: Ready To Earn Your Next Certificate?
verifiedCertificates.ctaSubtitle: Complete your course and unlock a verified certificate that showcases your skills.
verifiedCertificates.uniqueQR: Unique QR code on every certificate

steps.enrollDesc: Choose a course that matches your learning goals and start your journey.
steps.completeDesc: Watch videos, read learning materials, and finish every module.
steps.passDesc: Complete quizzes, assignments, and practical exercises with the required score.
steps.doneDesc: Once all requirements are met, your course will be marked as completed automatically.
steps.generatedDesc: Learnify AI instantly generates a personalized certificate with student name, course name, completion date, certificate ID, QR verification, and Learnify AI Seal.
steps.downloadDesc: Download your certificate as PDF. Share instantly on LinkedIn, resume, portfolio, or personal website.
steps.showcaseDesc: Strengthen your resume, improve your LinkedIn profile, demonstrate new skills, and build professional credibility.

benefits.industryDesc: Learn practical skills employers actually need.
benefits.verifiedDesc: Every certificate includes a unique verification ID and QR code.
benefits.careerDesc: Showcase achievements during internships, placements, and job applications.
benefits.shareDesc: Add certificates to LinkedIn, resumes, portfolios, and professional profiles.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights, tutorials, and updates from the Learnify AI team.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist, was moved, or is temporarily unavailable.

somethingWrong.title: Something went wrong
somethingWrong.desc: An unexpected error occurred. You can try refreshing the page or head back home.

demo.title: Try the product. No signup.
demo.subtitle: Click through a live AI Tutor chat, generate a quiz, and flip through auto-made flashcards.

gamified.desc: Streaks, XP, badges, and leaderboards that make learning addictive.

community.title: Join a learning community.
